text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky, today is your birthday, is it not?
Happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh, my birthday? ...Oh, you're right! I almost
forgot—thanks for the reminder!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You almost forgot? ...Correct me if I'm wrong, but
are you telling me you forgot your own birthday?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah, I didn't really forget, you see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, how should I put it? I guess I just wasn't
expecting anyone to wish me happy birthday...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So you caught me off guard. ...But thanks. I won't forget your kind gesture, King. Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I-in that case, it's decided! I, King, will make your
birthday one you will never forget!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course, we'll celebrate it next year as well, so
you'd best prepare yourself for what's coming!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Maybe my acting's a little too good...
